description: Fig. 10: Downward compatibility - bounded confidence opinion dynamics model only (adoption removed)

expected_outcome.description: No adoption occurs (GSI = 0). Opinion exchanges produce attitude clustering consistent with standard bounded confidence models. Std of attitudes decreases from 20 to approximately 18.

note: Validates BCAT downward compatibility with pure opinion dynamics models. Setting avg-of-thresholds=100 with std=0 and no-of-pioneers=0 ensures zero adoption.
